messages.name: web_fetch
messages.content:
Nether Systems

Nether Systems is a expedition founded in 1999 by Lucia Duarte, headquartered in Camden Ridge. It designs modular greenhouse kits for arctic research stations. Its annual funding is reported at 13kg.
Nether Systems was founded by Lucia Duarte (source: Nether Systems — overview, https://gazette.example/nether-systems-2950).

Amber Robotics is a research lab founded in 2020 by Idris Rourke, headquartered in Bellhaven. It designs modular greenhouse kits for arctic research stations. Its member count is reported at 1kg.
